title: Device Home Screen - Bluetooth turned off
scenario: Poly Studio Mobile app device list updates headset connection status correctly when Bluetooth is toggled off and back on
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the phone.
2. Ensure the headset is paired and connected to the phone via Bluetooth.
3. On the Home screen, verify the headset appears as 'Connected' in the device list.
4. Turn off Bluetooth on the phone (via Quick Settings or Settings → Bluetooth).
5. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app Home screen.
6. Observe the device list status for the headset.
7. Turn Bluetooth back on on the phone.
8. Go to the phone's Bluetooth settings and manually reconnect the headset.
9. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app Home screen.
10. Observe the device list status for the headset.
expected: When Bluetooth is turned off, the headset should be shown as 'Disconnected' in the Poly Studio Mobile app device list. When Bluetooth is turned back on and the headset is reconnected via mobile Bluetooth settings, the app should update to show the headset as 'Connected'.
